selected-updates.required: Select at least one page to continue

name.maxlength: Name must be 99 characters or less

surname.maxlength: Surname must be 99 characters or less

current-house-number.required: Enter the house number or name
current-house-number.maxlength: House number or name must be 50 characters or less

current-street.maxlength: Street must be 100 characters or less

current-townOrCity.maxlength: Town or city must be 100 characters or less

current-county.maxlength: County must be 100 characters or less

has-postcode.required: Select yes if you have a postcode, or no if you do not

dob.date: Enter a date of birth in the correct format
dob.after: Date of birth must be after 1 January 1900

email.email: Enter an email address in the correct format
